name: Process RFQ Endpoint - Successful End-to-End Flow
description: Validates the /rfq/process endpoint for a complete, successful RFQ review and quote creation, including all business rule validations and output upload.
input: POST /rfq/process with valid input_payload containing rfq_id, lines, TOTAL_TAX, and valid pipeline_run_id.
output: JSON response with success: true, quote_number, output_blob_path, and success message.
error_scenarios: Lead time, discount, or tax exempt validation fails
